name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANT N \* Number of processes

VARIABLE state \* Mapping from process IDs to their current state

(* State definitions *)
Idle == "idle"
Trying == "trying"
Critical == "critical"

(* Initial state: all processes are idle *)
Init == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {Idle, Trying, Critical}]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = Idle

(* Helper predicate: at most one process in critical section *)
AtMostOneCritical == 
    LET crits == {i \in 1..N : state[i] = Critical} IN
        Cardinality(crits) <= 1

(* Transition for a process i *)
Process(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ \E newState \in {Idle, Trying, Critical} :
        /\ newState # state[i]
        /\ (newState = Idle /\ state[i] = Trying
            \/ newState = Trying /\ state[i] = Idle
            \/ newState = Critical /\ state[i] = Trying)
        /\ AtMostOneCritical

(* Next-state relation: any process may transition *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N : Process(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

(* Optional type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {Idle, Trying, Critical}]
    /\ AtMostOneCritical

---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N,
    Participants,
    Coordinator

ASSUME
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ Participants \subseteq 1..N
    /\ Coordinator \in 1..N

    state,
    msgQueue,
    decision

(* Participant states *)
ParticipantState == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Message types *)
Message == [type: {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
            from: 1..N,
            to:   1..N]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
    /\ msgQueue = <<>>
    /\ decision = "None"

(* Helper: send a message *)
Send(msg) ==
    /\ msgQueue' = Append(msgQueue, msg)

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare ==
    /\ decision = "None"
    /\ \E p \in Participants:
        Send([type |-> "Prepare", from |-> Coordinator, to |-> p])

(* Participant processes Prepare *)
ProcessPrepare(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "Init"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
    /\ \E vote \in {"VoteYes", "VoteNo"}:
        Send([type |-> vote, from |-> p, to |-> Coordinator])

(* Participant processes Commit *)
ProcessCommit(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]

(* Participant processes Abort *)
ProcessAbort(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]

(* Coordinator processes VoteYes *)
ProcessVoteYes ==
    /\ decision = "None"
    /\ \E p \in Participants:

            /\ msg.to = Coordinator

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N \in Nat \setminus {0},
    PHIL \in 1..N,
    FORK \in 1..N

VARIABLES
    state,
    forkOwner

(* Helper predicates *)
CanEat(p) == 
    forkOwner[LeftFork(p)] = 0 /\ forkOwner[RightFork(p)] = 0

LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN N ELSE p - 1
RightFork(p) == IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ state \in [PHIL -> {"thinking","hungry","eating"}]
    /\ forkOwner \in [FORK -> 0]
    /\ \A p \in PHIL : state[p] = "thinking"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E p \in PHIL :
        \E action \in {"think","hungry","eat","putdown"} :
            CASE
                action = "think" /\ state[p] = "eating" -> 
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]
                    /\ forkOwner' = forkOwner
                [] action = "hungry" /\ state[p] = "thinking" -> 
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
                    /\ forkOwner' = forkOwner
                [] action = "eat" /\ state[p] = "hungry" /\ CanEat(p) -> 
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
                    /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = p, ![RightFork(p)] = p]
                [] action = "putdown" /\ state[p] = "eating" -> 
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]
                    /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = 0, ![RightFork(p)] = 0]
            END

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forkOwner>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [PHIL -> {"thinking","hungry","eating"}]
    /\ forkOwner \in [FORK -> 0 \/ PHIL]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N \* Number of processes

VARIABLES
    flag, \* [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    num   \* [1..N -> Nat]

(* Helper definitions *)
maxNum == \* maximum number currently taken
    IF \E i \in 1..N : flag[i] THEN
        MAX \{ num[i] : i \in 1..N : flag[i] \}
    ELSE 0

(* Initialization *)
Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Process i's actions *)
Choose(i) ==
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED num

TakeNumber(i) ==
    /\ flag[i] = TRUE
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED flag

Enter(i) ==
    /\ flag[i] = TRUE
    /\ num[i] > 0
    /\ \A j \in 1..N :
        j # i =>
        IF flag[j] /\ num[j] > 0
        THEN
            IF num[j] < num[i]
            THEN FALSE
            ELSE IF num[j] = num[i]
            THEN i < j
            ELSE TRUE
        ELSE TRUE

Exit(i) ==
    /\ flag[i] = TRUE
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED flag

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    Choose(i) \/ TakeNumber(i) \/ Enter(i) \/ Exit(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, num>>

(* Invariant: all numbers are non-negative *)
TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] \in Nat

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, each element is either a value or the special symbol EMPTY *)
(* head and tail are indices in 0..K-1 *)
(* size is the number of elements currently in the queue *)

(* Helper constants *)
EMPTY == "EMPTY"

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init ==
  /\ q = [i \in 0..K-1 |-> EMPTY]
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: add an element x to the queue if not full *)
Producer(x) ==
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = x]
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: remove an element from the queue if not empty *)
Consumer ==
  /\ size > 0
  /\ x = q[head]
  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = EMPTY]
  /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED tail

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \E x \in Nat : Producer(x)
  \/ Consumer

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ q \in [0..K-1 -> {"EMPTY"} \cup Nat]
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size \in 0..K

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES
  state,          \* Mapping from process id to its state
  turn            \* Process id whose turn it is to enter the critical section

State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

Init == /\ state \in [1..N |-> State]
    /\ turn \in 1..N

EnterCS(pid) == 
  /\ state[pid] = "idle"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![pid] = "trying"]
  /\ UNCHANGED turn

ExitCS(pid) == 
  /\ state[pid] = "critical"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![pid] = "idle"]
  /\ turn' = CHOOSE j \in 1..N : state[j] = "trying"

TryEnterCS(pid) == 
  /\ state[pid] = "trying"
  /\ turn = pid
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![pid] = "critical"]
  /\ UNCHANGED turn

Next == \E pid \in 1..N :
  EnterCS(pid) \/ ExitCS(pid) \/ TryEnterCS(pid)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N |-> State]
  /\ turn \in 1..N

Inv == \A pid \in 1..N : state[pid] # "critical" => 
  \A qid \in 1..N : state[qid] # "critical"

THEOREM MutualExclusion == Spec => []Inv

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES forks, state

THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING == 0, 1, 2

Init == forks \= [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ state \= [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1

Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0

TakeForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![Left(i)] = 1] /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]

PutForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Left(i)] = 0] /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]

Hungry(i) == state[i] = HUNGRY

Take(i) == CanEat(i) /\ TakeForks(i)

Put(i) == PutForks(i)

Next == \E i \in 1..N : (Hungry(i) /\ Take(i)) \/ Put(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

THEOREM DiningPhilosophersSpecImpliesNoDeadlock ==
  Spec => []~(state[1] = EATING /\ state[2] = EATING)

THEOREM DiningPhilosophersSpecImpliesNoStarvation ==
  Spec => []<>(state[1] = EATING)

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE bounded_fifo ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, full, empty

vars == <<q, head, tail, full, empty>>

Init ==
head = 0 /\ tail = 0 /\ full = FALSE /\ empty = TRUE /\
q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]

Producer(x) ==
head' = (head + 1) % K /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = x] /\ full' = FALSE /\ empty' = FALSE
Producer == \E x \in 1..K : Producer(x)

Consumer ==
tail' = (tail + 1) % K /\ full' = FALSE /\ empty' = (head = tail)
Consumer == \E x \in 1..K : Consumer

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == head \in 0..K /\ tail \in 0..K /\ full \in BOOLEAN /\ empty \in BOOLEAN /\
q \in [1..K -> 1..K]
====
